story_nodes.summary_ru: ИИ-стек схлопывает безопасность, производство, финансы и знание в контролируемый слой доступа, зависимости и ренты.
Структурная власть проявляется через лицензии, KYC, trusted users, vetted access, экспортные письма, контракты и kill-switch, а не только через собственность.
Ключевой риск decision-support: кто задаёт версии, фильтры, границы применения, данные, видимость и доступность.
Leverage может быть структурным, даже если есть утечки: важны цена, задержка, риск, слежка и зависимость от разрешений.

story_nodes.label_ru: Machine-speed cyber как стресс-тест, не установленный факт
story_nodes.summary_ru: Доказан defensive find-and-fix; автономная наступательная эксплуатация в масштабе остаётся спорной.

story_arcs.title_ru: От чипов к моделям: экспортный контроль поднимается вверх по стеку
story_arcs.thesis_ru: Контроль начинается с чипов и оборудования, затем распространяется на HBM, страновые тиры, ownership/headquarters, revenue-share и наконец на доступ к frontier-моделям.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Говорить не 'США полностью запретили AI Китаю', а 'США всё более дозируют доступ к слоям стека — чипы, дата-центры, parentage, модели — через лицензии, пошлины, KYC и trusted access'.
counterpoints: AI Diffusion Rule rescinded; successor withdrawn.
Model-control legal basis contested.
Controls leak through transshipment and cloud routes.

story_arcs.title_ru: Не эмбарго, а вентиль с пошлиной
story_arcs.thesis_ru: Режим чипов превращается из 'стены' в метринг доступа по поколению, цене, объёму, KYC и инспекциям.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Формулировать как toll-and-throttle: H20 charge/15%, H200/MI325X case-by-case, Blackwell denial, Huawei domestic target.
counterpoints: Пекин может сам дросселировать импорт.
Huawei/Ascend меняют базовую зависимость.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: Утечки не опровергают структурную власть: они превращают транзитные страны в узлы enforcement, риска и наблюдения.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Leverage does not need to be airtight to be structural.
counterpoints: Один seizure не даёт объём leakage.
Нужен масштаб route-around через Malaysia/Singapore/UAE.

story_arcs.title_ru: Залив: sovereign AI как условный доступ
story_arcs.thesis_ru: Gulf actors покупают frontier compute/model deployment, но доступ идёт через US-linked chips/cloud/model stack и assurance conditions.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Не 'полный суверенный ИИ Залива', а 'conditional access / sovereign buyer / protectorate AI'.
counterpoints: Условный доступ всё равно может накапливать реальную операционную capacity.
Capital/energy/land remain real Gulf levers.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: Контроль США стимулирует китайский parallel stack: Alibaba capex, DeepSeek/open weights, Ascend, rare earth counter-controls, 360 cyber-claims.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Китай строит counter-core, но не frictionless frontier sovereignty: узкие места — HBM, lithography, SMIC yields, energy and verification of vendor claims.
counterpoints: 360 capability claim disputed.
DeepSeek/Ascend training share not fully confirmed.
Open weights do not transfer chips/cloud/learning curves.

story_arcs.title_ru: Machine-speed cyber: от сильного заявления к честной оговорке
story_arcs.thesis_ru: AI-assisted vulnerability discovery is real, but reliable autonomous offense at scale is not established; the stronger structural claim is access asymmetry.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Говорить 'automated find-and-fix is advancing; autonomous offense remains contested'.
counterpoints: AIxCC/Big Sleep prove defense floor.
GTG-1002 and 360 remain vendor claims without independent IoCs/benchmarks.
Mythos leverage is access asymmetry.

story_arcs.title_ru: Тихий контроль: policy-gating, vetted users, ASL-3
story_arcs.thesis_ru: Чувствительные AI capabilities контролируются не только публичными банами, но и provider policy, due diligence, monitoring, vetted exemptions and trusted organizations.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Governance by access: review/approval, human-review requirements, ASL-3, vetted dual-use exemptions, trusted orgs.
counterpoints: Private governance is opaque and not public law.
Need concrete examples of exemption outcomes.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: Palantir показывает knowledge-structure capture: он задаёт слой, через который институт видит данные, строит common operating picture и действует.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Не 'Palantir владеет данными', а 'Palantir supplies the operational software layer through which institutions integrate, query and act on sensitive data'.
counterpoints: $10B Army EA is ceiling, $0 obligated at award.
Legal data ownership/control may stay with the state.
Performance claims need independent audits.

story_arcs.title_ru: Cognitive security: лаборатория → wild → государственный decision-support
story_arcs.thesis_ru: Prompt/data/model poisoning creates a machine-facing influence channel; evidence moved from mechanism to measured in-the-wild prevalence, while confirmed state incident remains gap.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Не 'госрешения уже отравлены', а 'поверхность атаки уже измерима; production/government incident remains missing'.
counterpoints: Novelty partly continuous with older supply-chain and influence operations.
Production incident still needed.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: Energy/grid is a bottom-stack layer; constraints are local, political and partly software-manageable.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Energy is a structural layer, but not an absolute wall.
counterpoints: Flexibility can cut some grid costs.
Public backlash may be broader AI anxiety, not only local DC impact.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: Battlefield AI use generates training data, which creates model improvement and sovereign compute demand.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Формулировать как telemetry/learning-curve advantage, не как proof of fully autonomous targeting.
counterpoints: Need primary evidence for autonomous targeting pipelines.
Public legitimacy sharply drops for fully autonomous lethal force.

story_arcs.title_ru: Финансы: от adoption к kill-switch governance
story_arcs.thesis_ru: AI in finance has moved from productivity/adoption to model-risk controls: inventory, validation, board accountability and decommissioning.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: В финансах AI — критический decision-support слой, который уже требует управляемого shutdown.
counterpoints: RBI rule still draft.
Need evidence of actual bank kill-switch implementation.

story_arcs.title_ru: Open weights: exit или смена зависимости
story_arcs.thesis_ru: Open weights create an exit at the model-artifact layer, but do not transfer chips, HBM, clouds, tacit iteration or operational tempo.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Open weights ≠ sovereignty; они меняют слой модели, но не весь стек.
counterpoints: DeepSeek/Ascend serving support matters.
Training-vs-inference independence remains unclear.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: 2022–2023 создают основу последующего режима: промышленная политика, первый экспортный контроль, публичный deployment shock, cloud/model lock-in, добровольные и обязательные правила, China counter-controls и closure of chip workarounds.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Это formation phase, а не пустота: основные hard-power события 2025–2026 были подготовлены именно 2022–2023.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: После Oct-2022 BIS controls Nvidia создала compliant China SKUs; Oct-2023 update закрыл часть этих loopholes.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Ранний прототип поздней логики toll-and-throttle: control → workaround → updated control.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: В 2023 frontier/generative AI становится объектом формального governance: NIST, CAC, G7, EO 14110, Bletchley, EU AI Act.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Разделять binding law, soft law, voluntary frameworks and provisional agreements.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: Данные для обучения, RAG и продукта всё чаще становятся не бесхозным web-субстратом, а лицензируемым входом через API, архивы и контентные сделки.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Говорить не “модели просто берут весь интернет”, а “часть высокоценного знания переводится в лицензируемые каналы доступа и становится отдельным слоем власти/ренты”.
counterpoints: Большая часть training-data supply chain остаётся непрозрачной.
Официальные релизы часто не раскрывают цену сделки.
Лицензии на данные не доказывают улучшение модели сами по себе.

story_arcs.thesis_ru: Frontier AI масштабируется через связки капитала, облака, GPU-capacity и каналов дистрибуции; “доступ к модели” зависит от capacity и контрактной архитектуры.
story_arcs.safe_wording_ru: Говорить не “один облачный провайдер владеет ИИ”, а “cloud capacity и инвестиционные партнёрства задают условия масштабирования и доступа к frontier-моделям”.
counterpoints: Multi-cloud capacity can reduce a simple lock-in narrative.
Fundraising is weaker evidence than deployed compute.
Some capacity announcements do not prove realized infrastructure.

story_edges.summary_ru: Экспортный контроль превращает частные продажи и инфраструктуру в геополитический рычаг.
Model-layer control показывает, что доступ к capability становится объектом власти.
Oct 2022 controls создают основание для последующего мирового tier regime.
Явный tier order был отозван/заменён discretionary режимом; нельзя говорить о стабильной архитектуре.
AI Diffusion Rule — главный факт формализации страновых тиров.
Withdrawal требует формулировать tier order как проект в движении.
BIS D:5 guidance показывает переход от destination control к parentage/headquarters control.
BIS letter documents model-layer export-control mechanism, но с contested legal basis.
Уточняет: event силён, legal validity contested; это не обычный published rule.
H20 charge supports the revenue/rent part of the chip-control story.
H20 ban/revenue share evolves into H200/MI325X case-by-case regime.
BIS case-by-case regime supports toll-and-throttle wording.
Blackwell denial + Huawei target show frontier denial and domestic substitution simultaneously.
Reframes leverage from simple ban to metered/taxed access.
Malaysia seizure proves leakage/route-around attempts.
Same seizure also proves enforcement layer: transit states become policing nodes.
Steelman: leakage exists; answer: cost/delay/risk/surveillance still structural.
D:5/headquarters guidance addresses third-country routing and parentage-based access.
G42/Huawei divorce shows access-for-alignment.
Assurance/realignment precedes large-scale UAE AI deployment.
Stargate UAE supports 'protectorate / sovereign buyer' tiering.
HUMAIN/xAI/Nvidia support Saudi sovereign buyer thesis.
UAE case parallels broader pattern: sovereign branding on foreign foundations.
Rare earth controls show China has its own production-structure leverage.
Alibaba capex supports continued counter-stack scaling.
DeepSeek shock gives model-layer exit, but learning curves/chips remain binding.
DeepSeek V4 Ascend support shows trajectory, but training-vs-inference remains uncertain.
360 event confirms strategic claim, not independent capability.
360 capability should stay disputed rather than verified.
AIxCC supports automated find-and-fix, not autonomous offense.
GTG-1002 remains disputed; prevents offense-at-scale overclaim.
Big Sleep shows defenders also wield AI vulnerability discovery.
Firefox evidence supports defender step-change but not autonomous offensive 0-day at scale.
Rediscovery counterevidence tempers Mythos '0-day factory' framing.
Reframes Mythos as access asymmetry, not settled capability leap.
Defense can scale too; drop offense-dominance language.
OpenAI policy supplies primary evidence for quiet review/approval and human review controls.
ASL-3 supports special CBRN/biotech access governance.
Planned ASL-3 due diligence develops into activated ASL-3 controls.
GPT-5.6 vetted partners show pre-release gating.
Mythos trusted orgs operationalize trusted-user access.
Quiet access controls make access itself a governance layer.
TITAN tactical edge and Maven program-of-record show Palantir expanding across military decision layers.
Maven institutionalizes Palantir as decision-support operating layer.
NATO MSS supports Palantir as alliance decision platform.
Primary Army EA record supports consolidation but corrects money-status overclaim.
75 contracts consolidated supports lock-in; $10B is ceiling not spend.
NHS case forces correction: Palantir supplies operational layer, not necessarily data ownership.
Palantir shows decision sovereignty risk at institutional workflow layer.
ICE ImmigrationOS generalizes Palantir logic from military to civilian enforcement.
Met Police case shows Palantir-style AI in internal policing/governance workflows.
Data poisoning gives concrete knowledge-structure attack surface.
OWASP LLM01 gives primary risk taxonomy for prompt injection.
Web-scale prompt injection and resume injection show mechanism entering real data/workflows.
Resume prompt injection gives observed AI-mediated evaluation workflow risk.
Agent red-team quantifies vulnerability to hidden-instruction attacks.
DoD agentic contracts show frontier labs entering national-security workflows.
Need confirmed government/enterprise decision-support incident; don't overclaim exploitation.
Six-firm TWh projection supports energy as bottom stack layer.
130 kW flexible cluster mitigates absolute bottleneck framing.
3–21% grid cost reduction supports flexibility counterargument.
Poll supports political surface/backlash to data centers.
Factcheck claim feeds high-level claim-check: energy is real but flexible.
Ukraine military AI demand connects battlefield AI to sovereign compute.
Drone-footage corpus supports war as data flywheel.
Factcheck claim links telemetry to thesis-level war data flywheel.
South Korea plan shows mass force-structure adoption.
Public legitimacy supports conditional military AI but sets red line around lethal autonomy.
Need primary proof before claiming fully autonomous targeting.
JPMorgan AI tools show critical business/revenue workflow adoption.
US regulators scrutinize lending/KYC/sanctions AI; supports critical finance governance layer.
RBI draft gives decommissioning/kill-switch logic.
Factcheck claim ties finance adoption to shutdown governance.
Final rules and actual implementation remain open.
Preprint formalizes supplier boundary control and mitigation architecture.
Claim-check translates decision-sovereignty risk into safe wording.
Mitigation claim defines the 'solution side' of the Palantir/vendor-model story.
DeepSeek R1 supports model-artifact exit at the open-weight layer.
DeepSeek shock is walked back by learning-curve/chip dependence constraints.
Sovereign branding on foreign foundations parallels Gulf conditional access.
IndiaAI case supports managed dependence / sovereign branding on foreign compute.

Meta releases Llama 3.1 405B as an openly available foundation model: backfill-факт для дуги “Open weights: exit или смена зависимости”. Openly available weights are not the same as open training data, open compute, or sovereign end-to-end capability.

DeepSeek releases R1 with open-source model and distilled models: backfill-факт для дуги “Open weights: exit или смена зависимости”. Keep performance claims as developer-reported unless independently benchmarked; open model does not solve compute dependency.

Meta introduces Llama 4 Scout and Maverick open-weight multimodal models: backfill-факт для дуги “Open weights: exit или смена зависимости”. Keep 'open-weight' distinct from fully open-source; verify license constraints before publication.

xAI releases Grok-1 weights and architecture: backfill-факт для дуги “Open weights: exit или смена зависимости”. Open release does not imply training-data openness or freedom from compute/cloud constraints.

OpenAI releases GPT-4o as a flagship multimodal model: backfill-факт для дуги “Тихий контроль: policy-gating, vetted users, ASL-3”. Frame as access expansion and product distribution, not as geopolitical control by itself.
Anthropic launches Claude 3.5 Sonnet: backfill-факт для дуги “Тихий контроль: policy-gating, vetted users, ASL-3”. Not a control event unless linked to later safety/access mechanisms.

OpenAI releases o3 and o4-mini reasoning models: backfill-факт для дуги “Тихий контроль: policy-gating, vetted users, ASL-3”. Do not treat model release as evidence of autonomous decision sovereignty without deployment context.

OpenAI and Microsoft disrupt state-affiliated actors using AI services for malicious cyber activity: backfill-факт для дуги “Machine-speed cyber: от сильного заявления к честной оговорке”. OpenAI states the observed uses were in support of malicious cyber activity; do not overclaim autonomous offensive capability.

Google Project Zero publishes Project Naptime for LLM-assisted vulnerability research: backfill-факт для дуги “Machine-speed cyber: от сильного заявления к честной оговорке”. Research architecture, not proven large-scale operational deployment.

Google Big Sleep agent finds exploitable SQLite vulnerability before release: backfill-факт для дуги “Machine-speed cyber: от сильного заявления к честной оговорке”. It supports defensive vulnerability discovery; it should not be used as proof of autonomous offensive exploitation.

DARPA AI Cyber Challenge semifinal culminates at DEF CON 32: backfill-факт для дуги “Machine-speed cyber: от сильного заявления к честной оговорке”. Use semifinal as program/progress signal, not final efficacy evidence.
Associated Press and OpenAI reach news archive/content-sharing agreement: backfill-факт для дуги “Данные как лицензируемый входной слой”. Financial terms were not disclosed; do not infer deal value.

Google and Reddit expand partnership with access to Reddit Data API: backfill-факт для дуги “Данные как лицензируемый входной слой”. The often-cited $60M/year figure is press-reported; official Google/Reddit posts confirm API access but not price.

OpenAI and Stack Overflow announce API partnership for technical knowledge: backfill-факт для дуги “Данные как лицензируемый входной слой”. Use as access to structured/vetted technical knowledge, not proof of broad model performance gains.

News Corp and OpenAI sign multi-year global content partnership: backfill-факт для дуги “Данные как лицензируемый входной слой”. Official release does not give dollar value; press estimates should be kept separate if used.

Amazon completes $4B Anthropic investment, reinforcing Claude-on-AWS/Bedrock distribution: backfill-факт для дуги “Cloud capacity и vendor lock-in”. Separate the March 2024 completion from later November 2024 expanded Amazon investment if both are used.

OpenAI selects Oracle Cloud Infrastructure to extend Microsoft Azure AI capacity: backfill-факт для дуги “Cloud capacity и vendor lock-in”. Use as capacity-extension / multi-cloud dependency, not as a complete break from Azure lock-in.

xAI raises $6B Series B to scale AI systems and infrastructure: backfill-факт для дуги “Cloud capacity и vendor lock-in”. Fundraising alone is weaker than a specific compute contract; mark as supporting capital concentration, not operational capacity.
Лицензирование данных показывает доступ к знанию как отдельный контролируемый слой.
Данные становятся частью структурной связки знания, ренты и доступа.
Cloud capacity и инвестиционные партнёрства показывают доступ как управляемую инфраструктурную зависимость.
Cloud capacity связывает capital, compute, model access и deployment power.
